major_bump_required_for: openapi breaking change in request/response schema
sse event type rename or removal

openapi_schema_source.description: Repository canonical OpenAPI schema for agentapi++

sse_event_contract_assumptions.event_framing: SSE events use event and data fields per frame
sse_event_contract_assumptions.ordering_assumption: Events are delivered in stream order for a single connection
sse_event_contract_assumptions.terminal_assumption: Stream ends after terminal done event or explicit transport close
sse_event_contract_assumptions.error_contract: error events include a machine-readable code and human-readable message
